name: Scotch Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1/2 cup Sugar
1/2 tsp Cinnamon
1/4 tsp Allspice
1/8 tsp Nutmeg
1/2 cup Flour
Boil all ingredients together, excluding the soda crackers, for one minute. Add the crackers and boil again for one minute. Pour into a regular pie crust. Add the topping before baking.
Topping: Mix together with 1/4 cup melted butter until crumb consistency. Sprinkle over the filling. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, then reduce temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
